caption: A person with short brown hair, wearing a dark garment, is visible in a small inset video feed in the upper right corner of each frame. The main area of the screen displays a presentation slide titled "Logging in Kubernetes Workflow" with the subtitle "Original data after correlation with API Server." Below the text is a block of JSON-formatted log data containing fields such as "data": "100000001", "host": "94.38.42.208", and "kubernetes": { "pod_name": "apache-logs-annotated" }. The content of the slide remains static across all frames, and the person in the inset feed remains in a similar posture, looking toward the camera. There are no significant changes in movement or text between the frames, indicating a steady presentation of the technical data.
